description: Global precipitation radar courtesy of RainViewer. No API key required. Manifest at api.rainviewer.com provides past frames (~2 h at 10-min intervals) and 30-min nowcast. URL parameters: {timestamp} = Unix epoch from manifest, {z}/{x}/{y} = Web Mercator tile coords, /2/ = color scheme (2 = original), /1_1 = smooth+snow.
